fda_cvm.source_name: FDA CVM — Animal & Veterinary Recalls / Withdrawals
fda_cvm.collection_method: Direct HTTP GET of published XLSX export (browser User-Agent required)

datagov_legacy.source_name: Data.gov / FDA Pet Food Recalls XLS (2009, legacy)
datagov_legacy.note: The accessdata.fda.gov XLS link found on Data.gov returns 404 as of 2026.

openfda_enforcement.source_name: openFDA Food Enforcement API — multi-keyword pet food query
openfda_enforcement.collection_method: Paginated GET per keyword (100/page, max 500/term); deduplicated by event_id/recall_number
openfda_enforcement.note: Broad keyword queries capture human food records. Scope filtering in Phase 2.

uk_fsa.source_name: UK Food Standards Agency — Food Alerts (Linked Data API)
uk_fsa.collection_method: Single HTTP GET to FSA Linked Data API with _limit=10000. Nested fields serialised as pipe-separated strings.
uk_fsa.note: Covers all FSA product alerts including human food, pet food, and feed. Scope filtering applied in Phase 2.

eu_rasff.source_name: EU RASFF (Rapid Alert System for Food and Feed)
eu_rasff.access_finding: RASFF portal is an Angular SPA. Backend API endpoints return the Angular shell HTML for unauthenticated requests — EU Login (iRASFF) is required.
eu_rasff.note: RASFF covers all 27 EU member states plus EEA/UK/Switzerland.

eu_rasff_manual.source_name: EU RASFF Manual Export (pet food category)
eu_rasff_manual.note: Manually exported from RASFF consumer portal (no auth required for manual export).

german_bvl.source_name: German BVL (Bundesamt für Verbraucherschutz und Lebensmittelsicherheit)
german_bvl.access_finding: No structured public API or bulk CSV/JSON download found. Session-based redirects (HTTP 303) for direct file access.
german_bvl.note: Alert summaries are available as HTML pages only.

french_anses.source_name: French ANSES (Agence nationale de sécurité sanitaire)
french_anses.access_finding: No structured public bulk-download API found. Alerts published as HTML/PDF press releases only.
french_anses.note: Alerts are published as HTML/PDF press releases only.

canada_cfia.source_name: Canada Health Canada / CFIA Recalls and Safety Alerts JSON
canada_cfia.organizations_excluded: TC (transport), Medical devices, Drugs and health products, Marketed health products, Controlled substances and cannabis, HC
canada_cfia.collection_method: Single HTTP GET of static daily-updated JSON file; filtered to Organization in {CFIA, Consumer product safety}; no authentication required.
canada_cfia.note: CFIA = Canadian Food Inspection Agency (food, feed, plant safety). 'Consumer product safety' = Health Canada branch handling non-food consumer recalls including pet food.  Scope filtering to pet-food-only records in Phase 2.

australia_fsanz.source_name: Australia FSANZ — Food Standards Australia New Zealand Food Recalls
australia_fsanz.access_finding: RSS feed (https://www.foodstandards.gov.au/food-recalls-rss.xml) confirmed accessible but contains only the 10 most-recent recalls — insufficient for historical analysis.  Drupal JSON:API endpoint returns HTTP 404 (disabled).  Full listing page shows the same 3 most-recent items.  No bulk CSV/JSON export endpoint found.
australia_fsanz.note: FSANZ oversees food safety standards for both Australia and New Zealand.  A historical bulk export would be valuable but is not publicly available. RSS feed URL documented for future manual checking.

new_zealand_mpi.source_name: New Zealand MPI — Ministry for Primary Industries Food Recalls
new_zealand_mpi.access_finding: All HTTP requests to mpi.govt.nz return an Incapsula bot-protection challenge (HTML iframe with NOINDEX/NOFOLLOW meta, incident ID in response).  The ACVM recalls page (agricultural compounds, vet medicines, pet food, animal feed) is similarly inaccessible without a full browser session.
new_zealand_mpi.note: NZ MPI / ACVM would be a good source for pet food and animal feed recalls in New Zealand.  Data can only be accessed via a real browser session.  Future work could use a headless browser or manual export.

australia_accc.access_finding: ACCC Product Safety (https://www.productsafety.gov.au/recalls) is a Drupal site.  JSON:API endpoint returns HTTP 404 (disabled).  Search page returns HTML only with no embedded structured data.  No public JSON/CSV bulk export endpoint found.
australia_accc.note: Recalls are browsable via the web search interface but not programmatically exportable.
